label: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity

node.label: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity
node.definition: Local update rules change connections from pre/post activity, errors, correlation, or spike timing without general end-to-end backpropagation.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity is to connect Linear algebra, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences to downstream capabilities including Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers, Self-organizing maps & competitive learning.
examples: substrate for Perceptrons & single-layer neural classifiers
substrate for Self-organizing maps & competitive learning
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Linear algebra, Labels, targets, rewards & preferences.

dependencies.rationale: Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity uses Linear algebra as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.

Perceptron, Hebbian, Oja & spike-timing plasticity uses Sequences, events & time series as a reusable ingredient in its defined operation.
